mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and impending earnings contractions, triggering risk-off repricing that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment acceleration signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in industrial production and residential housing starts indicates a synchronized demand-supply shock that erodes corporate profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with a directional accuracy exceeding 55% over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: During active rate-hiking cycles, elevated inflation readings force the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy longer than markets price in, causing duration risk to expand and equity multiples to contract, yielding negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns average positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds 7.0% and FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0%, contradicting the negative direction claim.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real disposable income and consumer credit expansion fuel aggregate demand growth, which translates directly into higher corporate revenue forecasts and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The correlation between RSAFS/GDPC1 growth and 5-day forward SPX returns drops below 0.10 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A breakdown in manufacturing output below its long-term trend indicates supply chain bottlenecks or capacity constraints that compress corporate margins, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX forward 60-day returns remain positive in more than 50% of instances where INDPRO drops below 100, falsifying the negative direction claim.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of rising unemployment and persistent inflation creates stagflationary pressure that forces equity valuations to reprice for lower growth and higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint UNRATE/CPIAUCSL signal yields a positive predictive rank correlation with 5-day forward SPX returns in more than 40% of rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle environment where housing permits collapse, the resulting wealth effect reversal reduces consumer spending momentum, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month as earnings revisions turn downward.
failure_condition: 20-day forward SPX returns average positive when HOUST declines exceed 5% in a late-cycle GDP growth environment, contradicting the negative direction hypothesis.
